RebuildBatchInstance.imageId: The image ID to use for rebuilding
RebuildBatchInstance.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password in the image. Default: false. true: use the preset password in the image; false: do not use it. 1. If true, password and keypairId must be empty. 2. Only supported for custom images or shared images.
RebuildBatchInstance.isPreserveData: Only applies to EBC instance local disks. Whether to preserve data during rebuild. When true, raidId and sysRootSize fields are ignored.
RebuildBatchInstance.adminPass: Instance password, must be encrypted as per the password encryption specification. One of adminPass or keypairId is required.
RebuildBatchInstance.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. Default: true.
RebuildBatchInstance.sysRootSize: Only applies to EBC instances. System disk size.
RebuildBatchInstance.keypairId: The key pair ID to bind to the instance being rebuilt. One of adminPass or keypairId is required.
RebuildBatchInstance.dataPartitionType: Only applies to EBC instances. Data disk partition format.
RebuildBatchInstance.rootPartitionType: Only applies to EBC instances. System disk partition format.
RebuildBatchInstance.raidId: Only applies to EBC instances. RAID configuration ID. Required when isPreserveData is false; ignored when isPreserveData is true.
RebuildBatchInstance.userData: Custom script for the rebuilt instance. If not provided, the current custom script (including GPU drivers and CFS filesystem) is used.
RebuildBatchInstance.useLastUserData: Whether to use the previous userData when rebuilding the instance.
RebuildBatchInstance.cleanLastUserData: Whether to clear the current custom script (including GPU drivers and CFS filesystem). Default: false.
RebuildBatchInstance.instanceIds: List of specified instance IDs. Maximum 100.
